markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on client progress and resolve key blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Surge is blocked by a vague PRD.** The current PRD for the `/career` page is too ambiguous for the client's designer (Gene) and needs a prescriptive rewrite to unblock content production.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [**Augment is refining its content strategy.** A "pause week" is dedicated to keyword research for new content and article refreshes, with a focus on proving the newsletter's value for nurture.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [**AI workflow testing shows promise.** Marisol's new AI pipeline for listicles is producing higher-quality articles, though they are still over the 3,000-word target.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [**Urgent need for expert contractors.** The team is actively sourcing specialists (WebDev, ML) for Webflow, Augment, and Surge to support project work.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

## Topics

### Surge: PRD Blocker & Content Strategy

  - [**Blocker: Vague PRD for `/career` Page**](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
      - [The PRD is too ambiguous for the client's designer (Gene), blocking all content production.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
      - [**Issue:** Unclear structure for sub-paths (e.g., `interview-prep`, `tools`) and how they relate to the main `/career` page.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**SEO Concern:** The current URL structure uses parameters (e.g., `?category=interview-prep`), which is poor for SEO. The team prefers a directory-based structure (e.g., `/career/interview-prep`).](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)
  - [**Content Strategy**](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
      - [Nathalie is delivering a second calibration article today to prompt client feedback and ramp up production.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [Nathalie will onboard the new content contractor, Khadijah, today to enable production to start immediately after keyword research is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [**Client Communication**](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)
      - [The client is unclear on project status. A weekly update is needed to provide crystal-clear progress reports (e.g., "Two calibration articles delivered, content strategy in progress, PRD is the main blocker").](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)

### Augment: Strategy & Workflow Improvements

  - [**Strategy "Pause Week"**](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
      - [The team is using this week to plan the next 2–3 months of content.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
      - [**Nathalie's Focus:** Keyword research to identify articles for refresh (same URL) vs. new content.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [**Talal's Role:** Define a scalable content strategy process. He will support Nathalie to find efficiencies for this project and build a repeatable framework.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [**AI Content Workflow**](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [Marisol is testing a new AI pipeline for listicles, built by reverse-engineering top-performing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [**Status:** The latest batch of 30 articles shows improved quality but remains over the 3,000-word target.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Marisol will create a dev ticket for the pipeline and begin building a similar one for "guides."](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [**Newsletter Revitalization**](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
      - [The newsletter has no organic growth and lacks a sign-up CTA on the website.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Liz will develop a vision for the newsletter as a nurture tool to drive organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [**Website Updates**](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
      - [Edin has submitted PRs for SEO improvements, block design, and CTA placement.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
      - [**Action:** Edin will flag these PRs in the channel for team review.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)

### Webflow: QBR Prep & Expert Sourcing

  - [**QBR Prep**](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [The QBR doc is ready for Jason's review.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [**Focus:** The QBR will be tailored for Colin (Webflow's contact). Future QBRs will aim to include senior stakeholders like Karad (Head of Dev Product) to discuss other workstreams (e.g., code components).](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Expert Sourcing**](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
      - [The team is actively sourcing contractors for three clients:](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
          - [**Webflow:** Front-end/full-stack developer to review integration docs.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
          - [**Augment:** Developer writer.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
          - [**Surge:** ML expert.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Action (Liz):** Follow up on recommendations from Ren and Stevie. Start with a writing sample request, then schedule a call.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:** Review the Webflow QBR doc.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)

      - [Complete Augment keyword research today.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [Onboard Khadijah (Surge content contractor) today.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
      - [Complete Surge keyword research tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [Follow up with Ren & Stevie on contractor recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [Develop a revitalization plan for the Augment newsletter.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [**Edin:** Flag Augment website PRs in the channel for review.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [**Surge Team:** Rewrite the `/career` page PRD with prescriptive details and SEO considerations.](https://fathom.video/share/RjKKEPNH6sepWWqgWwjNWxzAXHCqLh3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
